name: matrix-autolab
description: Unified plugin packaging for PaperBanana, AutoLab, AutoBaseline, local experiment recording, and the Matrix-AutoLab dashboard.

interface.shortDescription: Paper-to-experiment workflow with figure generation, implementation, ablations, baselines, and a local dashboard.
interface.longDescription: Matrix-AutoLab packages PaperBanana, AutoLab, AutoBaseline, local .autolab recording utilities, and a read-only dashboard into one plugin. Use the unified matrix-autolab entry for guided paper reproduction, implementation, training, ablations, and baseline comparisons, or call specialized entries directly when needed.
defaultPrompt: 根据 main.tex 帮我完成论文方法实现、训练和相关消融实验。
使用 matrix-autolab 从上次确认的阶段继续我的 AutoLab 实验。
Use matrix-autolab to start a paper reproduction workflow.
Resume my AutoLab experiment from the last confirmed phase.
Run baseline comparison for my completed AutoLab project.
